profile.name: Sean Geniel Garcia
profile.title: 1st Year - Computer Science Student
profile.bio: I am currently a Computer Science student based in the Philippines, driven to grow and build my skills in the tech field. I’m actively looking for opportunities like internships, team projects, and hackathons where I can learn and gain real experience. I enjoy challenging myself and stepping out of my comfort zone to improve. My goal is to keep developing my skills and work toward a strong future in the tech industry.

experience.role: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
experience.location: De La Salle University-Dasmarinas, Dasmariñas, Philippines
experience.description: Currently pursuing a degree in Computer Science, focusing on mastering data structures, algorithms, machine learning and intellegent systems.
highlights: Lead the design and development of a collaborative Team Portfolio Website as a final project, integrating modern frontend frameworks to showcase collective technical achievements.

experience.title: STI Career Compass
experience.description: A career guidance platform designed to assist incoming senior high school students in selecting the academic strand that best aligns with their skills and interests.
highlights: Collaborated in a team environment to design and deploy a functional 'Career Compass' for prospective students.
Developed an interactive assessment tool that categorizes users into ICT, STEM, HUMSS, or Culinary Arts strands.
Integrated a responsive UI/UX to ensure accessibility for students browsing via mobile devices.

experience.description: Completed an intensive one-year deep dive into CS50x, revisiting the curriculum in 2024 to master updated web frameworks and advanced logic puzzles.
highlights: Completed rigorous problem sets involving memory management in C and data structures.
Developed full-stack web applications using Python, Flask, and SQLite
Introduced to the foundational algorithms including binary search, bubble sort, and merge sort.

experience.role: Senior High School — ICT (Mobile Application & Web Development)
experience.description: Completed a specialized technical vocational track focused on mobile application and web development
highlights: Mastered core programming paradigms including Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) in Java.
Built and deployed mobile applications and responsive websites as part of a hands-on technical curriculum.
Developed a strong foundation in algorithm design, database management, and asynchronous programming.
Built hands-on projects including mobile apps for Android and websites using jQuery and CSS.

experience.description: Started being interested in Coding and its career oppurtunities.

projects.title: STI Career Compass
projects.description: An interactive guidance platform helping students navigate Senior High School academic strands through personalized assessments.
projects.longDescription: Developed as a Work Immersion capstone, Career Compass simplifies the transition to Senior High School. It features a custom-built assessment engine that analyzes student interests and strengths to recommend specialized STI strands like ICT, STEM, HUMSS, or Culinary Arts.

projects.title: Team Portfolio Website
projects.description: A terminal tool that summarizes your GitHub activity, open PRs, and commit streaks in one command.
projects.longDescription: DevPulse is an npm package that authenticates with the GitHub API and displays a beautiful terminal dashboard using Ink (React for CLI). Useful for daily standups.

projects.title: Switch Your Search PH
projects.description: A multimodal advocacy campaign promoting eco-friendly search engines as a simple tool for environmental sustainability.
projects.longDescription: Built to align with global Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs), Switch Your Search PH is a digital campaign that educates users on how their browsing habits can plant trees and fund climate action. The project features a responsive interface and resources on using search engines like Ecosia and OceanHero to create measurable environmental impact.

projects.title: eSOLI: Lost And Found App
projects.description: A centralized digital directory designed to help users report, track, and recover lost items within a community.
projects.longDescription: eSOLI is a community-driven web application that streamlines the lost and found process. It features a searchable directory of reported items, categorized listings, and a simple interface for users to submit recovery claims. This project focuses on solving the common problem of item misplacement through organized digital logging.

projects.title: Professional Portfolio
projects.description: A portfolio website showcasing my technical expertise, academic milestones, and projects.
projects.longDescription: Built with a focus on speed and clean architecture, this portfolio serves as a live demonstration of modern web development practices. It features a dynamic project gallery, an interactive career timeline, and a fully responsive UI/UX designed to highlight my journey from SHS coding fundamentals to my current Computer Science degree at DLSU-D.

certifications.title: AI Engineer for Developers Associate Certificate
